# Kafka Resource

Registers a [Kafka](https://kafka.apache.org) resource providing producer and consumer factories in your Dagster project.

## Install

```
pip install kafka-python>=2.0.2
```

<!-- FIELDS:START - auto-generated by tools/regen_readme_fields.py -->

## Fields

### Required

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `bootstrap_servers` | `str` | Comma-separated Kafka broker addresses, e.g. 'broker1:9092,broker2:9092' |

### Connection

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `resource_key` | `str` | `"kafka_resource"` | Key used to register this resource. Other components reference it via resource_key. |

### Other

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `security_protocol` | `str` | `"PLAINTEXT"` | Security protocol: PLAINTEXT, SSL, SASL_PLAINTEXT, SASL_SSL |
| `sasl_mechanism` | `str` | — | SASL mechanism: PLAIN, SCRAM-SHA-256, SCRAM-SHA-512 |
| `sasl_username_env_var` | `str` | — | Environment variable holding the SASL username |
| `sasl_password_env_var` | `str` | — | Environment variable holding the SASL password |

<!-- FIELDS:END -->

## Configuration

```yaml
type: dagster_component_templates.KafkaResourceComponent
attributes:
  resource_key: kafka_resource
  bootstrap_servers: broker1:9092,broker2:9092
  security_protocol: SASL_SSL          # optional, default: PLAINTEXT
  sasl_mechanism: SCRAM-SHA-256        # optional
  sasl_username_env_var: KAFKA_USER    # optional
  sasl_password_env_var: KAFKA_PASS    # optional
```

## Auth

For SASL-authenticated clusters set the environment variables named in `sasl_username_env_var` and `sasl_password_env_var`.

```
export KAFKA_USER=<username>
export KAFKA_PASS=<password>
```
